sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` as Problem_Investigation_ID,
CASE WHEN 
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Support Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Support Company` ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END  AS Company,
   CASE WHEN  `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`ServiceCI` IS NOT NULL THEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`ServiceCI` ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ServiceCI,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority` AS Priority,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS Status,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` AS Impact,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Generic Categorization Tier 1` AS Root_Cause,
   DATE(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`) as Submit_Date,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assignee` AS Assignee,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` AS Assigned_Group,
 `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group Pblm Mgr` AS Coordinator_Group,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Description` AS Description,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submitter` AS Submitter,
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`InstanceId`
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Support Company` IN ($AssignedSupportCompany)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority` IN ($Priority)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` IN ($InvestigationStatus)
AND  (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Generic Categorization Tier 1` In ($RootCause) OR `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Generic Categorization Tier 1` IS NULL)
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` NOT IN ('NULL')
AND `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` FROM `PBM:Problem Investigation` LIMIT 500"}
list.label: Investigation Status
